nasb.text: But Moses said, “The people, among whom I am, are 600,000 on foot; yet You have said, ‘I will give them meat, so that they may eat for a whole month.’

esv.text: But Moses said, “The people among whom I am number six hundred thousand on foot, and you have said, ‘I will give them meat, that they may eat a whole month!’

cnv.text: 摩西說：“這與我同住的人，能行的男人就有六十萬，你還說：‘我要給他們肉吃，使他們可以吃一個整月。’

ccb.text: 摩西说：“和我同行的，仅男子就有六十万，你还说要让他们吃整整一个月的肉！
